message:
feat: expand core crates with dtype casting, linalg ops, random distributions, IO improvements, and ufunc coverage

Extend fnp-dtype with additional type promotion and casting rules to
handle edge cases in mixed-precision arithmetic. Improve fnp-io with
broader serialization support for new array types. Add substantial
linalg operations to fnp-linalg for matrix decomposition and solving.
Expand fnp-random with distribution sampling implementations. Massively
extend fnp-ufunc with new reduction operations (var, std, argmin,
argmax, cumsum, cumprod, clip) and axis-aware broadcasting logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
